narrative:
Concord/Green (precinct in Fayette County) has 868 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.1 percentage points.
